description: Clicking the ' Products' navigation link should successfully load the main product listing page, displaying available items.
Clicking the 'Signup / Login' navigation link should direct the user to the appropriate authentication page, allowing options for both signup and login.
Clicking the 'Cart' navigation link should load the cart page, displaying either an empty state or prompting the user to proceed with checkout/login.
Enter a valid email address and submit the subscription form multiple times in rapid succession. The system must only process one successful submission, preventing duplicate entries.

Enter an email address string at the maximum allowed character length into the subscription field and submit. The form must handle the input gracefully (either accepting it or providing a clear boundary error).
Clicking the 'Contact us' navigation link should successfully load the contact page without any client-side errors.

Successfully submit the subscription form, navigate to another page (e.g., Products), and then return to the homepage. The successful subscription status or confirmation message should persist/be visible.
